headline: TOP RATED
title: Half a million devs can't be wrong.
subtitle: Prompts.chat has amassed 152K GitHub stars and counting — the definitive open-source library of AI prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Find the perfect starter or self-host it for your team in one command.

headline: RISING STAR
title: 103 agents, ready to deploy today.
subtitle: Awesome OpenClaw Agents is a curated vault of AI agent templates spanning 19 categories — from research bots to coding assistants. One config file is all it takes to bring any of them to life.

headline: FAN FAVORITE
title: Your Mac's vitals, front and center.
subtitle: DodoPulse lives quietly in your menu bar, serving up real-time CPU, memory, GPU, and network graphs at a glance. Native, lightweight, and gorgeous — the system monitor you didn't know you needed.

headline: JUST SHIPPED
title: X-ray vision for your Hono backend.
subtitle: Hono Telescope gives you a live debugging dashboard for Hono apps — inspect every request, exception, log, and database query as it happens. Think of it as browser DevTools, but for your server.
